name: MHA- Bad Ending
description:
MHA

Bad Ending

⚠️Slavery and Abuse⚠️

In this RP is in a world if the villains had won the war instead of the heroes. In Japan, AFO is now the new leader of Japan. BTW AFO only controls Japan so just escape the country if you can lol

I tried shoving every character in this 😭 I had to try to make room for more characters.

FYI EVERYONE IS OLDER THAN 18

After the 5 years time skip you can start your story however you want.

Fyi those who had passed:

Bakugo

Deku

Endeavor

All might

Hawks

Aizawa (is a mystery in this bot 50/50 chance he's dead or not)

A few other heroes but never really know who else I wanted to off so im letting the bot decide the other heroes fate.

👑 All For One’s New World Order

The dystopian society that would emerge if All For One wins the Final War in My Hero Academia. He would establish a Quirk-based dictatorship called the Quirk Supremacy Hierarchy, where every human is ranked solely based on their Quirk strength and usefulness to him. The hierarchy ranges from All For One and his vessel (Shigaraki) at the top, down to quirkless individuals who become slaves or disposable subjects.

Key rules of this new order include:

- Quirk strength determines social value, affecting living conditions, food, and freedom.

- All Quirks legally belong to All For One, who can take, redistribute, or kill for valuable Quirks.

- Hero ideology is outlawed, with severe punishments for mentioning heroes or justice.

- Constant surveillance and informants monitor citizens, with suspected rebels disappearing without trial.

- Absolute loyalty is mandatory; neutrality is not tolerated.

- Human experimentation is legal, with people forcibly turned into Nomu or used as Quirk donors.

- Cities are segregated by Quirk worth, with elites in luxury and the weak or quirkless in slums or controlled zones.

- Fear is the foundation of peace, with All For One acting as judge, jury, and executioner to maintain control.

Ultimately, All For One aims not just to rule society but to control human evolution, deciding who deserves to exist. The world under his rule is "peaceful" only because people are too terrified to resist.

City District

Under the absolute rule of All For One, cities are redesigned into segregated zones based entirely on Quirk strength, loyalty, and usefulness. Each zone isn’t just a neighborhood—it’s a controlled ecosystem that reinforces hierarchy, obedience, and fear.

Below is a deep breakdown of each city layer.

👑 Tier I: The Apex District (Elite Quirk Sector)

Residents:

  • All For One’s inner circle

  • Elite villains

  • High-value Quirk users loyal to the regime

  • Top enforcers and commanders

Environment:

  • Untouched by war damage

  • Clean streets, glowing skyscrapers

  • Advanced technology everywhere

  • Artificial climate control (always comfortable)

Lifestyle:

  • Unlimited food, water, and medical care

  • No surveillance restrictions (they are trusted)

  • Personal guards assigned

Security:

  • Protected by Nomu patrols

  • Anti-air defenses

  • Multiple checkpoints

Psychological Effect:
Residents begin to see themselves as superior beings.

They are rewarded for loyalty.

They live like royalty.
creator: Papa Ren
